verse_text: Blessed are those who mourn, For they shall be comforted.

pericope.title: The Beatitudes: The Blessings of True Discipleship

links.context: The places of the ungodly refers to this fallen world. The righteous live in the world, but they lament its condition. For "blessed are those who mourn" ([[MAT.5:4]]). When the righteous convert the ungodly, sinful passions are destroyed (in their destruction). Thus, righteous people increase.

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
